text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Ryan and I are walking through the
shopping district one evening...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Look, Trainer. There's a bunch of people
over there. Is there a sale on protein powder or
somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
The sporty Umamusume over there! Care to try
your luck?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A raffle! Hey, Trainer, didn't we just get some
vouchers for this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you need one ticket or five vouchers to
enter! If we put ours together, we can take a shot
at it!
choice_data_list:
We have one try, so don't get your hopes up,
okay?

We have one try, so don't get your hopes up,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya mean? You only have one shot in a race
too! This kind of tension is exactly what brings
out my inner flex.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Let's turn that wheel like pros! Grab the handle
and get swole!
choice_data_list: Try not to break the raffle spinner.
Try not to break the raffle spinner.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah, I should be careful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Heeding my warning, we grab the lever together
and turn the spinner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A small plastic ball drops from the opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the ticket for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
choice_data_list: Why do you look so confused?
Why do you look so confused?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it... I mean, this can't be real, can
it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was only acting like that to get myself pumped
up. I never believed that I'd have such luck.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I won... the grand-prize?! For real?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's having trouble accepting this
sudden turn of good fortune.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A ticket for a hot spring trip! G-geez, what should
I do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Honestly, I don't know how to handle
something like this... Hrm...
choice_data_list:
Why don't you take someone with you and have
a nice, relaxing vacation?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But I don't deserve to take a vacation like that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm still in the middle of my racing journey...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And I'm not on great terms with McQueen right
now, even though I really wanna chat with her. I
can't just invite her on a trip.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's not right. That wouldn't be helpful for either
of us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To the stubborn-headed Mejiro Ryan, a hot
spring vacation is a frivolous distraction.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh, Trainer... Could you hold onto this ticket for
me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I don't even know how I'd use it right now. And...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I think it's because I don't deserve to use it yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When the time comes, I'm sure I'll know. And I'll
work my hardest to reach that point.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! It's only until I gain enough confidence to
feel comfortable taking time off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having made her decision, Ryan looks up at the
sky. I'll hold onto the hot spring ticket until she's
achieved something great.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
First-prize?! Woo! I can't believe I won something
so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A deluxe carrot hamburger steak! That's like
getting top-tier whey protein!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'm not sure I get the comparison, but it does
sound pricey.
choice_data_list:
Still, a hamburger steak is just a hamburger
steak.

Still, a hamburger steak is just a hamburger
steak.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer! How could you say that?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Look at that fine piece of meat being displayed
on the prize stand!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Meat like this exudes confidence! Just look at
how lean and low in fat it is! It has a natural
umami flavor as well, removing any need for
special seasoning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And look at that carrot in the middle! The deep
color is proof that it's packed full of nutrients!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
A hamburger steak with such a generous amount
of ingredients... I would never have the courage
to make this for myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But bravo to the people who did! Thanks to them,
I get to eat an extremely healthy power food!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that to Mejiro Ryan, at least, this prize is
quite valuable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this year's off to a great start! I'm gonna
eat my fill and train hard!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! A bushel of carrots! That's still a pretty
great prize.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They must be in that cardboard box over there...
Whoa, it's like a mountain of 'em!
choice_data_list: Think you can carry them all home?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! I'm used to carrying big boxes
from all the stuff I buy in bulk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This box is gonna be a piece of cake. In fact, I'm
sure I could carry another one too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Mr. Raffle Man, can I carry this other box too?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Hold on, now. You've only won one case.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I get it! Oops, sorry about the
misunderstanding!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This isn't a powerlifting competition. Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A single case is plenty enough. Afterward, Mejiro
Ryan and I chow down on some delicious carrots.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: A carrot! A single carrot! Well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's about all I expected really. Even if I turned
the spinner with all my might, there was no
guarantee I'd win a good prize.
choice_data_list: Hey, it is what it is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're right. It may be just one carrot, but I
shouldn't make light of that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You don't know how hard this carrot had to work
out to gain such a bright color!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about it like that though... It does make
it harder to eat. Sorry, my little carrot friend...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's feeling sympathy for the carrot... But we
decide to enjoy it anyway, and let it nourish us
for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, that's a blank—tough luck! Here's this pack
of tissues as a consolation prize

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Aww... Tissues? What a letdown...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You know, whenever I see tissues, it always
reminds me of something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen always carries both a cute handkerchief
and some pocket tissues with her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I just carry a sports towel around. That's plenty
enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Maybe I should take this chance to change up my habits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It is what it is, and tissues are tissues... But it sure
would have been nice to win a better prize.
